element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns timing, cover mechanics, movement types (roll, crawl, dive) in low-stakes setup phase
Player transitions to scope view, learns window targeting and operative support before direct combat
Player enters embassy with submachine gun, must locate hostages while eliminating terrorists in dual-perspective environment
Player uses floor map to locate hostages and terrorists; some ports show entity locations
Player receives newspaper report showing speed, accuracy, hostages rescued, and operative safety; four distinct endings based on casualties

typical_relief_triggers: Completing operative descent without being spotted
typical_tension_triggers: Terrorists visible in windows during Section 2
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Three-phase escalation: stealth setup → ranged support → direct combat; tension accumulates across sections with minimal relief until mission completion

difficulty_curve.early_game: Section 1 introduces avoidance mechanics with searchlights; timing-based, forgiving on early operatives
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Section 2 requires precision sniper support while managing operative descent; adds visibility puzzle element
difficulty_curve.late_game: Section 3 combines dual-perspective navigation, hostile encounters, and hostage escort objectives; cumulative difficulty from operator losses carries forward

notable_level_patterns.description: Game divides into distinct gameplay sections: sniper approach, sniper support/descent, and embassy interior assault. Each section introduces new mechanics while maintaining strategic continuity through operator roles
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Single embassy mission (no traditional level breaks)

notable_level_patterns.description: Gameplay moves from side-scrolling (Section 1) → scope shooting gallery (Section 2) → first-person hallways + third-person rooms (Section 3), deepening immersion as player gets closer to objective
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Progressive movement from street to building exterior to embassy interior

notable_level_patterns.description: Four distinct endings based on casualty outcomes: perfect success, hostage casualties, operative casualties, or mutual casualties. Encourages different playstyles across attempts
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Final evaluation screen with newspaper report
